name: Crystal
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: A rare crystal – it must be worth something.

name: Old Smuggler's Jacket
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 1
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

name: SGOW SW.52 Body Armor (decommissioned)
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 2
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

name: SGOW SW.73 Light Armor
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 3
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: The standard armor of combat sailors and field officers of the Kaiser's fleet. The breastplate can reflect even the sun's rays. In it, you will be the most stylish Galician <s>marauder</s> scientist of all! And definitely the most resilient.

name: Flare Gun
desc: Hebel Leuchtpistole – it will provide you with all sorts of features, from peaceful signals to unexpected light shows.

name: Flare Gun
desc: Hebel Leuchtpistole – it will provide you with all sorts of features, from peaceful signals to unexpected light shows.

name: Alloy Steel
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, Tech Tree
desc:
The latest development in the world of metallurgy, this steel with the addition of alloying elements allows it to withstand much higher temperatures and be more resistant to physical damage. It was thanks to this development that Ironclad tramplers gained their ability to land directly from orbit.
Other metals simply wouldn't be able to withstand such temperatures and stress from a fall.

name: The Great Silence
short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Anti-reactor rifle
Trigger: Hold to charge
Action: Emergency shutdown of reactors, motor-reactors, and any other kind of aurogen-based power plants
desc: A special tool designed to neutralize aurogen-based energy sources. Developed by Neue Zukunft as some kind of "fire extinguisher" capable of initiating an emergency shutdown of aurogen reactors that have gotten out of control. Thanks to the efforts of Kaiser's Friends, it was transformed into a futuristic anti-reactor rifle.

name: Kill Switch
short:
Type: Ammo
Suitable for: Anti-reactor rifles
desc: Anti-reactor charge. High-tech, low availability.

name: The Great Silence Stock
desc: Science, learned the hard way.

name: The Great Silence
desc: A special tool designed to neutralize aurogen-based energy sources. Developed by Neue Zukunft as some kind of "fire extinguisher" capable of initiating an emergency shutdown of aurogen reactors that have gotten out of control. Thanks to the efforts of Kaiser's Friends, it was transformed into a futuristic anti-reactor rifle.

name: Crystal
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: A rare crystal – it must be worth something.

name: Backpack
short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Extra space to carry things hands-free
Capacity: X slots
desc: Your adventure companion: holds everything from guns to treasures!

name: Large Backpack
short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Extra space to carry things hands-free
Capacity: X slots
desc: One of those huge and bulky adventure companions that can hold more than you usually need – from weapons to treasure! If you can lift it.

name: Small Backpack
short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Extra space to carry things hands-free
Capacity: X slots
desc: Your small yet capable adventure companion: it holds just what you need – from weapons to treasures!

name: Black Box
short:
Type: Trip Data Recorder
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Incredibly valuable proof of your victory over someone.

name: NZ Mk1 Modified Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (low)
desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go really fast for a short time thanks to the modernization of the valve system, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

name: NZ Mk2a Enriched Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (average)
desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go pretty fast for a short time thanks to the improved structure of the aurogen, which gives the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

name: NZ Mk3 Impure Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Short-term increase in trampler speed (huge)
desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
Makes your trampler go a bit faster for a short time thanks to the additives that give the motor-reactor a short burst of extra energy right after the rod is activated.

name: Time Bomb
short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Moderate
desc: An incredibly serious argument that can open a lot of doors for you. Make sure to activate it before running away.

name: Canned Sea Deer XL
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading, Tech Tree
desc: An XL-sized can of the famous Sea Deer, an exotic fish discovered by Sophie's first colonists.

name: Crowns
short:
Type: Money
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: The main currency here. Has a familiar face on it.

name: Box
short:
Type: Crate
Purpose: Storage and transportation
Features: Suitable for almost all types of cargo
desc: A standard wooden box suitable for storing and carrying literally anything that fits in it.

name: Ammo crate
short: Ammo crate

name: Raw Aurogen Crystal
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree

Features: Hazardous radiation
desc: A fragment of a strange crystal, ready for transport. Caution – radiation hazard.

name: Debug resource box #1
short: Debug resource box #1

name: Debug resource box #2
short: Debug resource box #2

name: District Officer's Portable Safe
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading, Tech Tree
desc: A safe that contains something very valuable that belonged to the District Officer. Considering how bureaucratic the Austro-Hungarians are, it's probably a bunch of documents.

name: NZ Mk2 Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
desc: Your main source of energy. Put it in your reactor to keep the trampler working.

name: Wok Bomb
short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Absolute
desc: A sea mine cooked up according to a secret Molfar recipe, with the addition of local coral dust, a pinch of aurogen, and a countdown clock. Served inactivated. Once activated, an explosion is inevitable.

name: Ficus
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading and Tech Tree
Features: Does not fit on cargo compartment shelves. Evacuation to orbit is possible only while held in-hand. Very delicate and fragile.
desc: It's a living plant!

name: Canned Food
short:
Type: Food
Features:
- When consumed, regenerates health;
- When placed in the trampler's fridge or other storage, allows for quick respawning
desc: The amount of food on board the trampler determines the number of quick respawns available for the Crew. You also can just eat it to improve your well-being.

name: Canned Food
short:
Type: Food
Purpose: When placed in the trampler's fridge or any other storage, allows for quick respawning.
desc: The amount of food in the fridge is the number of respawns available for the crew.

name: 90 mm Grapple-Harpoon
short:
Type: Harpoons
Caliber: 90 mm
Suitable for: Harpoon cannons
Features: Able to grab items without damaging them

name: HG-6 Contact Grenade
short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Damage: High
desc: A single-use hand grenade – or a reusable mace. Fragile. Handle with care.

name: Spark Contact EMP Grenade
short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Damage: High

Features: Creates an electromagnetic wave that overloads and shuts down aurogen reactors
desc: The body of an HG-6 grenade with a modified warhead. The correct ratio of coral dust and crystallized aurogen reacts upon exploding and creates a small electromagnetic pulse. Most aurogen machinery is unable to withstand the load of such a pulse and shuts down in emergency to avoid burnout.

name: Spark EMP Mace
desc: High-tech flint. Bring the steel!

name: Spark Contact EMP Grenade
desc: The body of an HG-6 grenade with a modified warhead. The correct ratio of coral dust and crystallized aurogen reacts upon exploding and creates a small electromagnetic pulse. Most aurogen machinery is unable to withstand the load of such a pulse and shuts down in emergency to avoid burnout.

name: HG-6 Mace
desc: A grenade can be a blunt weapon, yes.

name: HG-6 Contact Grenade
desc: A single-use hand grenade – or a reusable mace. Fragile. Handle with care.

name: Podorozhnyk Bio-Emitter
short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Defensive
Action: Regenerates health of all living beings within range
Features: One-time use
desc: A portable medical station. When activated, generates a healing field capable of mending wounds and restoring health. A prototype. Short-term action. Will not protect against fatal injuries.

name: V1 Repair Patch
short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
Features: Near-instant pointwise repairs; one-time use
desc:
Primarily designed to quickly repair hull breaches on Imperial submarines, but in practice has proven extremely useful in repairing most types of integrity faults.
Manufactured by SGOW.

name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

name: Ironclad's Cargo Box
short: A crate that belonged to an Ironclad trampler.

name: Old Smuggler's Jacket
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 1
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: The leather is sturdy enough to save you from a shot or two.

name: SGOW SW.52 Body Armor (decommissioned)
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 2
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: A well-worn breastplate, quilted jacket, and stylish belt – it immediately becomes clear that the wearer is not only ready for battle, but has already been through many.

name: SGOW SW.73 Light Armor
short:
Type: Armor
Protection: Physical, level 3
Features: Regenerates over time
desc: The standard armor of combat sailors and field officers of the Kaiser's fleet. The breastplate can reflect even the sun's rays. In it, you will be the most stylish Galician <s>marauder</s> scientist of all! And definitely the most resilient.

name: MedKit
short:
Type: Medical Supplies
Purpose: Quick restoration of health
Features: Allows for full restoration
desc: Whether it's a critical wound or a small scratch, the MedKit will fix it in no time.

name: Multi-Tool
short:
Type: Gear
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
desc: Your portable repair tool. Fixes small problems and most critical malfunctions. Too small for big renovations.

name: Orbital Strike Pointer
short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Offensive
Action: Calls for an artillery strike from orbit in the specified area
Features: One-time use
desc: The portable sighting complex "Zeigefinger" of the orbital surveillance system "Bärenjäger" (aka "Berehynia"), developed by Neue Zukunft in cooperation with SGOW to help pioneers explore new worlds. Rumor has it that the system is still present in the orbit of Sophie.

name: 8x21 mm Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
desc: Basic ammo used by most small firearms. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 8x21 mm FMJ Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 8x21 mm Incendiary Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Incendiary
desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Contains highly flammable materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 8x21 mm Toxic Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Toxic
desc: Special ammo used by most small firearms. Contains highly toxic materials provided by Sophie's Molfars.

name: 8x21 mm HV Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 8 mm
Suitable for: Pistols and revolvers
Features: Increased velocity
desc: Special high-velocity ammo used by most small firearms. Its increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: Pestkop Lorenz Amplifier
short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Offensive
Action: Increases the damage of bullets and shells fired from the inside
Features: One-time use
desc: A portable amplifier station. When activated, it generates an electromagnetic field. Metal objects that have started moving inside the field receive an additional charge, which, for example, significantly increases the damage from bullets and shells. Initially developed to protect against harmful radiation, in practice, it has also proven useful in a somewhat opposite way.

name: Von Liebig Reflector
short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Defensive
Action: Reflects bullets and shells fired from outside
Features: One-time use
desc: Deflects projectiles in the direction it was pointed when activated. The result of experiments involving aurogen in the mirror-manufacturing process.

name: Domovyk Protective Dome
short:
Type: Experimental Equipment
Purpose: Defensive
Action: Stops bullets and shells fired from outside
Features: One-time use
desc: A portable protection station. When activated, generates a magnetic field designed to slow or even stop any physical objects moving into it at high velocity. Won't stop a human or a trampler, but works well against harsh environmental conditions such as bullets and projectiles. Included in the standard set of pioneer equipment.

name: Repair Kit
short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Quick on-site repairs
Features: Allows for major repairs and restoration of destroyed trampler compartments
desc: If you've noticed that your trampler has more holes than it has walls, this is the right tool to use.

name: M82 Rifle
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading Speed: Medium
desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading.

name: M82 Rifle Stock
desc: SGOW M82 revolver rifle stock. When you're out of ammo or don't have time to reload.

name: M82 Rifle
desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading.

name: Coral Dust
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Rare subspecies of local coral, additionally cleaned and ground into powder. Widely used in military and pharmaceutical fields.

name: Coral Chunk
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: One of the most common souvenirs brought by tourists from Sophie, it is a fairly valuable resource required in the production of some items.

name: Fabric
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Usually a common material, but not in this case: over the years, most local fabric items have either crumbled to dust or are beyond salvage.

name: Fabric Scraps
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Various pieces of fabric and leather, mostly remnants of clothing, tents, carpets, curtains and even sails, left long ago in the harsh desert climate. However, some look quite new.

name: Gunpowder
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Standard military gunpowder. Not of the best quality due to cheap components, nevertheless sufficient for mass production. Used for most conventional military ammunition.

name: High-Grade Gunpowder
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: The new smokeless gunpowder recipe, discovered on Sophie. The Imperial forces combined their regular gunpowder with coral dust, resulting in a powder that lasted longer and produced much less smoke.

name: Leviathan Meat
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: The lump of meat of a mysterious creature that lurks beneath the sands. But where's the carcass?

name: Leviathan Skin
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: A piece of skin that, by its texture, is reminiscent of a snake's skin but, by the looks of it, this piece belonged to something way bigger that a snake.

name: Scrap Metal
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Various parts – anything made from metal – gathered into one pile.

name: Metal Rods
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: High-quality metal forged into rods – ready for use and easy to transport.

name: Mechanical Parts
short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: Commonly used parts in heavy-duty machinery.

name: Pneumatic Parts
short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: Crucial elements in more sophisticated machinery.

name: Computing Module
short:
Type: Spare Parts
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree, tramplers
desc: These parts were used in the most technological marvels created by the brightest minds of the Empire.

name: Mixtures
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Various mixtures, syrups, tinctures and pills that were widely available for practically anyone on Sophie.

name: Optic Lenses
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: These lenses were used everywhere: from rifle and gun sights to eyeglasses and binoculars. Due to their fragile structure, there are not many left on Sophie, so they are considered very valuable.

name: Reinforced Leather Strips
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Strips of leather sewn with fabric are a fairly durable material used to make uniforms, shoulder pads, and body armor for imperial troops.

name: Scrapped Ammo
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: This ammo will likely blow up in your hands or won't work at all if you try to use it. But the materials from it can still be salvaged and repurposed.

name: Threads
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: A basic spool of thread used by anyone.

name: Weapon Parts
short:
Type: Raw Material
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Receivers, spare barrels, gas tubes and other replaceable parts of regular military weapons.

name: EB "Vita" Police Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: High
desc: A modified 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used by the Sophie Gendarmerie. Received a six-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

name: EB "Tiszt" Award Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 8 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: High
desc: A special modification of the 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used as decoration for personal service to the state, courage and high professionalism. In addition to artistic decoration, the revolver also received an eight-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

name: Award Revolver Handle
desc: Luxurious, but still reliable. You can always show off to others with this one.

name: EB "Tiszt" Award Revolver
desc: A special modification of the 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used as decoration for personal service to the state, courage and high professionalism. In addition to artistic decoration, the revolver also received an eight-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

name: Police Revolver Handle
desc: Good and reliable. You can always stop a crime with it.

name: EB "Vita" Police Revolver
desc: A modified 8 mm revolver manufactured by Eisenblut, used by the Sophie Gendarmerie. Received a six-shot drum compatible with speed loading.

name: EB "Zseb" Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: One of the cheapest 8 mm revolvers you can find on the grey market. Production – Eisenblut; sales – virtually any arms dealer.

name: Revolver Handle
desc: Good and reliable. You can always hit them with it.

name: EB "Zseb" Revolver
desc: One of the cheapest 8 mm revolvers you can find on the grey market. Production – Eisenblut; sales – virtually any arms dealer.

name: EB "Bantam" Revolver
short:
Type: Revolver
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: Short
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Increased melee damage
desc: A six-shot 8 mm revolver made by Eisenblut, improved by Kaiser's Friends for very close combat encounters.

name: EB "Bantam" Knuckle Duster
desc: This is precisely what's known as a very close encounter.

name: EB "Bantam" Revolver
desc: A six-shot 8 mm revolver made by Eisenblut, improved by Kaiser's Friends for very close combat encounters.

name: 9x42 mm Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
desc: Ammo that is used by most infantry rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 9x42 mm FMJ Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Its full metal jacket makes it highly effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 9x42 mm Incendiary Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Incendiary
desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Contains highly flammable materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 9x42 mm Toxic Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Toxic
desc: Special ammo for basic infantry rifles. Contains highly toxic materials inside. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 9x42 mm HV Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 9 mm
Suitable for: Rifles
Features: Increased velocity
desc: Special high-velocity ammo for basic infantry rifles. Increased powder charge makes bullets fly faster compared to standard ammunition. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: M1866/9 "Einzel" Breechloader
short:
Type: Single-Shot Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: Shoot, reload, repeat. A very cheap and affordable breech-loading rifle, chambered for 9 mm cartridges. Another link in the evolution of firearms from muzzle-loading muskets to modern rifles.

name: KF886/9R "Mehrzel" Repeater
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading Speed: High
desc: A field modification of a 9 mm breechloader by Kaiser's Friends as an attempt to convert a mass-produced single-shot musket into a magazine-fed rifle. Although a fairly successful modification, it was not widely used due to its excessive complexity.

name: KF886/9R "Mehrzel" Rifle Stock
desc: I wouldn't have to do it this way if I had a bayonet...

name: KF886/9R "Mehrzel" Repeater
desc: A field modification of a 9 mm breechloader by Kaiser's Friends as an attempt to convert a mass-produced single-shot musket into a magazine-fed rifle. Although a fairly successful modification, it was not widely used due to its excessive complexity.

name: M1866/9 "Pioneer" Breechloader
short:
Type: Single-Shot Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: A special decorated version of the M1866/9 breechloading musket, created in collaboration between Bartka and Kaiser's Friends. The work was personally supervised by Vasyl Kresalo. It was issued as a reward weapon for the first wave of <s>marauders</s> explorers who paved new paths and rediscovered Sophie in its current form. Among them, it received the nickname "Troubleshooter".

name: M1866/9 "Pioneer" Stock
desc: I wouldn't have to do it this way if I had a bayonet...

name: M1866/9 "Pioneer" Breechloader
desc: A special decorated version of the M1866/9 breechloading musket, created in collaboration between Bartka and Kaiser's Friends. The work was personally supervised by Vasyl Kresalo. It was issued as a reward weapon for the first wave of <s>marauders</s> explorers who paved new paths and rediscovered Sophie in its current form. Among them, it received the nickname "Troubleshooter".

name: M1866/9 "Einzel" Stock
desc: I wouldn't have to do it this way if I had a bayonet...

name: M1866/9 "Einzel" Breechloader
desc: Shoot, reload, repeat. A very cheap and affordable breech-loading rifle, chambered for 9 mm cartridges. Another link in the evolution of firearms from muzzle-loading muskets to modern rifles.

name: M82 "Aperture" Rifle
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Rifle
Caliber: 9 mm
Magazine: 6 rounds
Range: High
Reloading speed: High
Features: Aperture sight
desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle with a modified aperture sight. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading. Mounted with the special sights that allow the shooter to cover longer distances with increased accuracy.

name: M82 "Aperture" Rifle Stock
desc: SGOW M82 revolver rifle stock. When you're out of ammo or don't have time to reload.

name: M82 "Aperture" Rifle
desc: The SGOW M82 9 mm revolver rifle with a modified aperture sight. Highly versatile like a Swiss Army knife. Quite slow when it comes to reloading. Mounted with the special sights that allow the shooter to cover longer distances with increased accuracy.

name: RW1 Rocket Launcher
short:
Type: Rocket Launcher
Ammo: Rockets
Magazine: 1
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: The Raketenwerfer 1 is one of the secret prototypes built by the Kaiser's SGOW engineers on Sophie. Unfortunately, it never reached Earth -– the entire batch was "lost" during the mass evacuation.

name: Armor-Piercing Rocket
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: Rocket
Suitable for: Rocket launchers
Features: Increased damage against tramplers
desc: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Packs a punch, but is ineffective against infantry.

name: High-Explosive Rocket
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: Rocket
Suitable for: Rocket Launchers
Features: Increased damage against infantry
desc: An unofficial rocket for the RW1 rocket launcher, handmade by someone very resourceful. Not effective against armor, but capable of inflicting significant damage to infantry in a fairly large radius.

name: RW1 Rocket Launcher Tube
desc: Non-standard situations require non-standard solutions.

name: RW1 Rocket Launcher
desc: The Raketenwerfer 1 is one of the secret prototypes built by the Kaiser's SGOW engineers on Sophie. Unfortunately, it never reached Earth -– the entire batch was "lost" during the mass evacuation.

name: Blitz 10R Pistol
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 10 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading speed: High
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. Highly effective in close quarters. Compensates for its low accuracy with a high fire rate.

name: Blitz 10R Pistol Handle
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" semi-automatic pistol's handle. As swift and deadly as the rest of the pistol.

name: Blitz 10R Pistol
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. Highly effective in close quarters. Compensates for its low accuracy with a high fire rate.

name: Blitz PPS-5 Pistol
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 5 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: High
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A preproduction sample with a reduced capacity magazine capable of holding five rounds.

name: Blitz PPS-5 Pistol Handle
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" semi-automatic pistol's handle. As swift and deadly as the rest of the pistol.

name: Blitz PPS-5 Pistol
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A preproduction sample with a reduced capacity magazine capable of holding five rounds.

name: Blitz 15R Pistol
short:
Type: Semi-Automatic Pistol
Caliber: 8 mm
Magazine: 15 rounds
Range: Medium
Reloading Speed: High
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A rare modification with an increased capacity magazine, capable of holding 15 rounds. Even more bullets to miss the target with.

name: Blitz 15R Pistol Handle
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" semi-automatic pistol's handle. As swift and deadly as the rest of the pistol.

name: Blitz 15R Pistol
desc: The O'Donnel "Blitz" 8 mm semi-automatic pistol. Swift and deadly. A rare modification with an increased capacity magazine, capable of holding 15 rounds. Even more bullets to miss the target with.

name: Pepper Mill Shotgun
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 3 rounds
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
desc: The custom O'Donnel 12 GA shotgun that was called the "Pepper Mill" because of it rotating barrels. "Give 'Em Some Pepper!"

name: 12 GA Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
desc: Basic buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 12 GA Heavy Buckshot Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special buckshot ammo used by all shotguns. Bigger pellets make it more effective against armor. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 12 GA Dragon's Breath Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Incendiary
desc: Incendiary buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are mixed with highly flammable materials. A prototype made by Neue Zukunft.

name: 12 GA Toxic Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Toxic
desc: Special buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are mixed with highly toxic materials provided by Sophie's Molfars.

name: 12 GA Buckshot Ammo (HE)
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Explodes on impact
desc: Explosive buckshot ammo. Buckshot pellets are filled with an explosive mixture. Extraordinary efforts led to an impressive result. Manufactured by Kaiser's Friends.

name: 12 GA Shotgun Slug
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 12 GA
Suitable for: Shotguns
Features: Single slug
desc: Experimental ammunition that uses a single solid bullet instead of buckshot, which significantly increases lethality. Designed for hunting very large animals. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: Drobulet Shotgun
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. They call it a "Drobulet" between each other.

name: Drobulet Shotgun Stock
desc: Stock for the makeshift shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends to save ammo.

name: Drobulet Shotgun
desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. They call it a "Drobulet" between each other.

name: Drobulet Shotgun (Vertical Choke)
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
Features: Vertical choke
desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. Additionally equipped with a vertical choke to increase effectiveness against tall and thin targets.

name: Drobulet Shotgun Stock
desc: Stock for the makeshift shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends to save ammo.

name: Drobulet Shotgun (Vertical Choke)
desc: A makeshift 12 GA shotgun frequently used by Kaiser's Friends. Additionally equipped with a vertical choke to increase effectiveness against tall and thin targets.

name: Triplet Shotgun
short:
Type: Shotgun
Caliber: 12 GA
Magazine: 3 rounds
Range: Very Short
Reloading Speed: Medium
Features: Volley fire
desc:
O'Donnell's exclusive 12-gauge shotgun, nicknamed the "Triplet" because it fires in bursts from all three barrels at once. Blows away everything in its path (literally!).
Unfortunately, the design, modified for volley fire, is not able to withstand the power of alternative cartridges, so this model is only compatible with conventional 12-gauge ammunition.

name: Triplet Shotgun Stock
desc: The custom O'Donnel shotgun's stock.

name: Triplet Shotgun
desc:
O'Donnell's exclusive 12-gauge shotgun, nicknamed the "Triplet" because it fires in bursts from all three barrels at once. Blows away everything in its path (literally!).
Unfortunately, the design, modified for volley fire, is not able to withstand the power of alternative cartridges, so this model is only compatible with conventional 12-gauge ammunition.

name: 70 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun Cannons
desc: Canister shot that contains a high number of small projectiles. Utilized by shotgun cannons.

name: 70 mm Shotgun Cannon Slug
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun cannons
Features: Single slug
desc: Armor-piercing ammunition with a solid shell, designed for use with 70 mm shotgun cannons. It can't compete with 80 mm long-barreled artillery shells, but without those – beggars can't be choosers.

name: 70 mm Smoke Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 70 mm
Suitable for: Shotgun cannons
Features: Creates smoke cover
desc: A shotgun turret shell casing filled with a special mixture that, when detonated, creates a huge cloud of thick smoke. Not intended to cause damage, but can become a key tactical tool that can change the outcome of a battle. A prototype from Neue Zukunft.

name: Pepper Mill Shotgun Stock
desc: The custom O'Donnel shotgun's stock.

name: Pepper Mill Shotgun
desc: The custom O'Donnel 12 GA shotgun that was called the "Pepper Mill" because of it rotating barrels. "Give 'Em Some Pepper!"

name: 40 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
desc: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons.

name: Long-Range 40 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
Features: Increased range
desc: A smaller-caliber cannon shell utilized by autocannons. Contains increased powder charge to increase range.

name: 40 mm Low-Recoil Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 40 mm
Suitable for: Autocannons
Features: Reduced recoil
desc: A 40 mm shell with a slightly altered powder formula, providing reduced recoil at the cost of a lower initial projectile velocity. Even though the projectile is slower, it still remains deadly in close- and medium-range combat encounters. Manufactured by SGOW engineers to extend the service life of older versions of the fleet's autocannons, which had significantly less efficient recoil mechanisms compared to their newer models.

name: Small Valuables
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading
desc: Some valuable knick-knacks left behind by the previous residents during the evacuation.

name: RG79s Smoke Grenade
short:
Type: Grenade
Fuse: Contact
Features: Lots of smoke
desc: A disposable source of black smoke. Whether it will be a decoy, signal, or disguise is up to you. Handle with care.

name: RG79s Mace
desc: A grenade can be a blunt weapon, yes.

name: NZ Mk2-RF Smokeless Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Increases the reactor's stored energy level
Features: Hides smoke from the trampler's motor-reactor (temporarily)
desc:
A main energy source. A standardized capsule with aurogen that fits most reactors and motor-reactors.
A covert ops version that can cause the motor-reactor to stop emitting visible smoke for quite a long period of time.

name: 1874s Petros Sniper Rifle
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Telescopic sight
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

name: 11x54 mm Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 11 mm
Suitable for: Heavy rifles
desc: Basic ammo used by long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 11x54 mm AP Ammo
short:
Type: Ammo
Caliber: 11 mm
Suitable for: Heavy rifles
Features: Armor-piercing
desc: Special armor-piercing ammo with a hardened penetrating core. Used with long-range rifles. Manufactured by SGOW.

name: 1887/2 "The Twin" Double-Barreled Rifle
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 2 rounds
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Double-barreled
desc: Bartka's "The Twin" 11 mm double-barreled sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. It's always nice to have a second chance. Even if it's rarely needed, given the power of each shot.

name: Double-Barreled Rifle Stock
desc: There may be two barrels, but only one stock.

name: 1887/2 "The Twin" Double-Barreled Rifle
desc: Bartka's "The Twin" 11 mm double-barreled sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. It's always nice to have a second chance. Even if it's rarely needed, given the power of each shot.

name: Petros Rifle Stock
desc: Bartka "Petros" sniper rifle stock. For situations when a rifle scope becomes a microscope.

name: 1874s Petros Sniper Rifle
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

name: 1874e Petros Rifle
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

name: Petros Rifle Stock
desc: Bartka "Petros" bolt-action rifle stock. Where's my bayonet...

name: 1874e Petros Rifle
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Every shot counts that much more when you only have one shot available.

name: 1874e/sd Petros Rifle (Silenced)
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Silencer
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Equipped with a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

name: Petros Rifle Stock
desc: Bartka "Petros" bolt-action rifle stock. For situations when even a silencer is too loud.

name: 1874e/sd Petros Rifle (Silenced)
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm bolt-action rifle. Simple, reliable, and very accurate. Equipped with a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

name: 1874s/sd Petros Sniper Rifle (Silenced)
short:
Type: Heavy Rifle
Caliber: 11 mm
Magazine: 1 round
Range: Very High
Reloading Speed: Low
Features: Telescopic sight and silencer
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight and a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

name: Petros Rifle Stock
desc: Bartka "Petros" bolt-action rifle stock. For situations when even a silencer is too loud and the target is too close.

name: 1874s/sd Petros Sniper Rifle (Silenced)
desc: The Bartka "Petros" 11 mm sniper rifle. Equipped with a telescopic sight and a silencer. A handy tool to surprise your opponent with.

name: Autopistol (Test)
desc: Swift and deadly. Highly effective in close quarters. Compensates its low accuracy with high fire rate.

name: Rusty Shovel
short:
Type: Tool
Purpose: Dig up treasures
Features: One-time use
desc: This shovel is in terrible condition and literally falls apart in your hands. However, according to the accounting journals, it seems that funds for its repair and maintenance were regularly allocated by the foreman.

name: 80 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
desc: A regular type of shell utilized by Naval Cannons.

name: 80 mm EMP Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Creates an electromagnetic wave capable of shutting down reactors
desc: One of the Neue Zukunft prototypes. The warhead of a standard 80 mm artillery shell is reinforced with stabilized aurogen crystals. Deals less damage compared to the base shell, but is capable of disabling all aurogen-based machinery in the area of impact.

name: 80 mm Proximity Fuse Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Proximity detonation and easier aiming
desc: A rather unique invention consisting of a conventional 80 mm cannon shell combined with a proximity fuse. When fired, the shell explodes at a distance sufficient to damage the target, which greatly simplifies aiming – no direct hit required! Invented by some unknown engineer who definitely didn't blow himself up in the process of creating it.

name: High Velocity 80 mm Shell
short:
Type: Shells
Caliber: 80 mm
Suitable for: Naval cannons
Features: Increased velocity
desc: A modification of standard artillery shells, compatible with naval cannons. Increased initial projectile velocity, made possible by a revised powder charge formula.

name: KF Mk 9000 Unstable Energy Rod
short:
Type: Fuel
Base: Aurogen
Purpose: Significantly boosts trampler's speed for a short duration
desc: Regular Energy Bar from NZ that was tampered with by KF engineers (if you can call them that). Tampering included adding different compounds to it and hoping that it won't explode. As a result you have modified energy rod that will provide a more powerfull boost to your reactor at cost of reduced energy capacity. Also it's not called unstable for nothing, even minor kinetic damage will release all the energy from the rod to the surrounding area jamming all aurogen based machinery

name: Valuable Papers
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Trading
desc: These papers might contain some information that can be sold to someone.

name: Weird Coral
short:
Type: Raw Material?
Purpose: Crafting, Tech Tree
desc: A weirdly shaped coral that emits some brightly colored fumes, similar to those often seen on Upiórs. Inhaling these fumes would probably not be the best idea...

name: Crate of 1889 Chardonnay
short:
Type: Valuables
Purpose: Crafting, trading, Tech Tree
desc: Wine from Sophie's best vineyards. It is well bought by snobs in Vienna.

name: Wok Bomb
short:
Type: Explosives
Fuse: Clockwork
Damage: Absolute
desc: A sea mine cooked up according to a secret Molfar recipe, with the addition of local coral dust, a pinch of aurogen, and a countdown clock. Served inactivated. Once activated, an explosion is inevitable. Extremely powerful!
